author: studio notes
body: Video pilot — The Orange Menace. Direction: render in the DEFAULT painterly style, but make the Citadel feel ALIVE. The old cards were too static and basically the same wide pool shot five times. New cards vary the vantage every beat (aerial push-in → hand-held plaza → low tracking → churning macro → slow descent) and add real activity: crowds, banners, couriers, doves, splashing fountains. The orange rot stays the one still, wrong thing in a moving world.

author: studio notes
body: Workflow note: video is the FINAL step. Approve the storyboard style first (3 options via the style toggle), then hit '🎬 Make video' to render a 15–30s clip in the approved style. Veo turns each card's scene into a moving shot with smooth transitions.
